NextToken.description: The token that specifies the next page of results to return. To request the first page, leave NextToken empty. The token will expire in 24 hours, and cannot be shared with other accounts.

CrossAccount.description: The Status if the discoverer will discover schemas from events sent from another account.

LastModified.description: The date and time that schema was modified.

VersionCreatedDate.description: The date the schema version was created.

CreationDate.description: The time and date that the code binding was created.

LastModified.description: The date and time that code bindings were modified.

Status.description: The current status of code binding generation.
